<!-- |
|     PhD in Economics, Universitat Pompeu Fabra, Expected 2032
|     Master in Applied Economics, ITAM, 2025
|          High Honors
|     B.A. Economics, ITAM, 2023 -->

|  |  |
|:-------------------------------------------------|---------------------:|
| PhD in Economics, Universitat Pompeu Fabra | Expected 2026 - 2032 |
| Master in Applied Economics, ITAM, High Honors | 2023 - 2025 |
| BA in Economics, ITAM | 2016 - 2021 | 

: {tbl-colwidths=[60,40]}

<!-- 
| Master of Research in Economics, Universitat Pompeu Fabra | Expected 2027 - 2028 |
| Master of Science in Economics, Barcelona School of Economics | Expected 2026 - 2027 |  -->
